buyers.thesis: Ally completed 3 add-on HVAC acquisitions in 2025 (J Hood-Manassas VA, Tri-County Aire-MD, Above & Beyond-DE), more than doubling revenue. Mid-Atlantic HVAC platform backed by Watchtower Capital. Air Control's McLean VA location fills NoVA territory gap perfectly.
buyers.source: Exa - Ally Services 3 acquisitions in 2025, Yahoo Finance Feb 2026

buyers.thesis: PE backer of Ally Services. Pursuing disciplined HVAC acquisition strategy in Mid-Atlantic. Air Control is exactly the type of local brand they acquire and integrate into Ally's platform.

Stonebridge Partners-backed HVAC platform acquired Comfort Solutions (Suffolk VA) in May 2025 and Math Mechanical in Nov 2024. Building Eastern US HVAC service platform. Air Control adds Northern Virginia commercial/residential HVAC capability.

Alpine Investors-backed HVAC/plumbing/electrical platform with 140+ investments and 50%+ employee growth YoY. 8,000+ employees across US. Air Control adds Virginia market density to their national platform.
buyers.source: Exa - Apex Service Partners 140 investments, PitchBook profile

buyers.thesis: Operates 25 brands across 27 markets in 14 states with 7,300 employees. Manages 400K+ service agreements. Air Control's McLean VA market extends Wrench Group into the high-value DC metro HVAC market.

Littlejohn acquired United Air Temp (Northern Virginia HVAC) in April 2024. Inc. magazine recognized company. Air Control is a direct competitor in NoVA — acquisition eliminates competition and adds density.
buyers.source: Exa - Littlejohn/United Air Temp acquisition April 2024

buyers.thesis: National HVAC service company with 100+ locations. Actively acquiring local HVAC operators to fill market gaps. Air Control's DC metro territory is a high-demand, high-margin market.
buyers.source: Industry knowledge - Service Experts acquisition model

buyers.thesis: Major HVAC/plumbing provider in Mid-Atlantic (DE, PA, MD, NJ). Expansion into Northern Virginia through Air Control acquisition would extend their service territory south into the DC metro.
Home services platform backed by Alpine Investors, actively acquiring HVAC and plumbing companies. Air Control fits their model of partnering with established local brands.
buyers.source: Industry knowledge - Redwood Services PE model

buyers.buyer_name: F.H. Furr Plumbing, Heating, AC & Electrical
buyers.thesis: Major NoVA home services provider. Acquiring Air Control would consolidate McLean-area HVAC market share and add technicians in a tight labor market.
buyers.source: Industry knowledge - F.H. Furr NoVA presence
